summary: Type-checking failed with hundreds of errors (many 'Module has no attribute' messages) in arrow- and datetime-related pandas files, causing the job to fail.
root_cause: The type checker reported numerous 'Module has no attribute' errors (641 errors, 298 unique), primarily in pandas/core/arrays/arrow/array.py and pandas/core/arrays/datetimes.py, which caused the CI job to fail.

evidence.reason: Shows that the type checker produced a large number of errors and that the failure is due to static checks.

evidence.quote: pandas/core/arrays/arrow/array.py:2708: error: Module has no attribu...
evidence.reason: Demonstrates a recurring 'Module has no attribute' type error occurring in the arrow-related array implementation.

evidence.quote: pandas/core/arrays/arrow/array.py:1002: error: Module has no attribu...
evidence.reason: Another instance of the same 'Module has no attribute' error in the same file, indicating multiple occurrences.

evidence.quote: pandas/core/arrays/datetimes.py:1368: error: Module has no attribute...
evidence.reason: Shows the 'Module has no attribute' error also appears in datetime-related code, not just arrow files.

suggested_fix: Inspect the reported 'Module has no attribute' errors in the listed files, and either provide appropriate typing stubs / install the typed dependency, or add targeted type ignores (e.g. # type: ignore[attr-defined]) or adjust the type-checker configuration for these modules so the checks pass.
